stemHtml: Which statement is correct about the management of aeronautical databases? (EASA CAT.IDE.A.355)

options.a: The operator shall ensure the distribution and insertion of current and unaltered aeronautical databases to all aircraft that require them within 28 days.
options.b: The operator shall ensure the timely distribution and insertion of current and unaltered aeronautical databases to all aircraft that require them.
options.c: The operator shall ensure the distribution and insertion of current and unaltered aeronautical databases to all aircraft that require them within 3 days.
options.d: The operator shall ensure the distribution and insertion of current and unaltered aeronautical databases to all aircraft that require them within 24 hours.
